positive: A stylized celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, designed as an elegant, high-contrast graphic print. The owl has detailed feather silhouettes and glowing golden eyes. The background incorporates cosmic nebula elements, stylized constellations, and scattered minimalist stars. The overall composition is central and symmetrical, suitable for chest printing on apparel. Style: Modern geometric, ethereal, line art, retro-futurism. Color Direction: Deep indigo, midnight blue, cosmic purple, with accents of bright gold and luminous yellow. Lighting: Dramatic, backlit, glowing from within. Composition: Perfect for a square crop, clean edges, vector art feel, print quality.
